rationale: Builds directly on the current best soft quant-aware projection ramp and leaves training throughput unchanged. The only functional change is to keep per-row scales and row-offsets in fp32 for quantized `attn.proj.weight` and `mlp.proj.weight`, while leaving payload weights int8 and the rest of the quantizer unchanged. That targets the final exact roundtrip metric more directly than another late-phase schedule replay, compounds with the projection-sensitive best path, and should remain within the size cap because only projection metadata grows.
title: Projection FP32 Quant Metadata
